questions.assertion: Assertion (A): Hydrocarbons are generally colourless and odourless.
questions.reason: Reason (R): They do not have a functional group which causes colour and odour.
opts: (A) Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
(B) Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
(C) A is true but R is false
(D) A is false but R is true
questions.explanation: Hydrocarbons do not have any functional group, which is responsible for their colour and odour. This makes them colourless and odourless.

questions.reason: Reason (R): They do not contain any multiple bond.
opts: (A) Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
(B) Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
(C) A is true but R is false
(D) A is false but R is true
questions.explanation: Alkanes are saturated hydrocarbons because they do not contain any multiple bond, i.e., double or triple bond.

questions.assertion: Assertion (A): Alkynes have one triple bond in their molecule.
opts: (A) Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
(B) Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
(C) A is true but R is false
(D) A is false but R is true
questions.explanation: Alkynes are unsaturated hydrocarbons because they contain one or more triple bond. Since they have one triple bond, they are called alkynes.

questions.assertion: Assertion (A): Alkanes have lower boiling point compared to alkenes.
questions.reason: Reason (R): Due to the presence of weak dipole-dipole forces in alkenes.
opts: (A) Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
(B) Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
(C) A is true but R is false
(D) A is false but R is true
questions.explanation: Alkanes have lower boiling point compared to alkenes because alkenes have stronger London dispersion forces due to their larger molecular size, not because of dipole-dipole forces.

questions.assertion: Assertion (A): Alkyne is the most unsaturated hydrocarbon.
questions.reason: Reason (R): It contains the maximum number of multiple bonds.
opts: (A) Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
(B) Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
(C) A is true but R is false
(D) A is false but R is true
questions.explanation: Alkyne is the most unsaturated hydrocarbon because it contains the maximum number of multiple bonds, which are the characteristic of unsaturated hydrocarbons.

questions.assertion: Assertion (A): Alkenes are less reactive than alkynes.
questions.reason: Reason (R): Due to the stability of double bond in alkenes.
opts: (A) Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
(B) Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
(C) A is true but R is false
(D) A is false but R is true
questions.explanation: Alkenes are less reactive than alkynes because of the stability of double bond in alkenes. Double bond in alkenes is less reactive than the triple bond in alkynes.
